# How to add your real profile photo

1. Rename your photo file to `linkon.jpg` (or `linkon.png`).
2. Drop it into this folder: `public/images/`
3. The portfolio's Hero section is already configured to load `/images/linkon.jpg`.

That's it — refresh the page and your real photo will appear.

Supported formats: `.jpg`, `.jpeg`, `.png`.
Recommended: a square or 4:5 portrait, at least 800×1000 pixels.
